Data Processing Addendum (PRC) between Lanqiao Harbour Capital (Shenzhen) Co., Ltd. (controller; USCC 91440300MA9U8Q3P1D) and Silver Harbor Analytics (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. (processor; USCC 91310110MA1L7X5E0R), effective upon countersignature.
Processing purpose and legal basis: employment onboarding/administration and issuer liaison under PIPL, CSL, and DSL; compliance with PRC Securities Law and stock exchange rules for inside information handling.
Contacts: DPO Ms. He Min (dpo@silverharbor.cn), Controller Privacy Office (privacy@lanqiaoharbour.com.cn), tel. +86-138-1234-6801; registered address (controller): Room 1802, Tower C, Yulan Plaza, Xingkai Road 88, Nanshan District, Shenzhen 518199.
Categories: name, position, mobile number, business email, payroll bank account number, resident identity card number, PRC passport number (for travel), device IDs for access control, and restricted-list status for MNPI governance.
Illustrative identifiers in workflows: Resident ID No. 440305200112123217 for onboarding of Mr. Qiu Jun; Passport No. E98765432 for Ms. Du Ling’s issuer site visit; vendor due diligence against Unified Social Credit Code 91520100MA7T6Q9L3C.
Payment and registration: example settlement account 6222 8888 0000 9130 at Seabird Commercial Bank (fictional), payee “Silver Harbor Analytics (Shanghai) Co., Ltd.”; registered office for processor: Suite 602, Building B, Qiyuan Center, Jinyu Road 66, Pudong New Area, Shanghai 200136.
MNPI controls: employees accessing draft earnings, undisclosed financings, or mandate letters are designated handlers; Mr. Chen Wei is placed on the restricted list with a trading blackout per SSE rules and internal Policy SH-IR-07.
Cross-border transfers: HR and IR contact files may be exported to Hong Kong affiliates under the CAC Standard Contract for Personal Information Export; if data includes minors under 14, guardian consent is required or transfer is declined.
Localization and retention: originals stored in PRC (Chengdu and Nanjing zones); finance/tax vouchers 10 years, recruitment files 24 months, access logs for MNPI systems 6 years, subject to extension upon CSRC inquiry holds.
Data subject rights: submit DSAR via dsar@lanqiaoharbour.com.cn or mail to the DPO; identity is verified using masked credentials (e.g., 4403********3217) and registered mobile number; responses within statutory timelines.
Negative/precision note: the label “Manager” or a form field “Name:” without corroboration is insufficient for identification, and the government service hotline 12345 must not be used to send personal information to us.
Bait/validation rule: any record containing Resident ID 11010519900101888X (checksum invalid) or USCC 91110108MA002X0000 (checksum invalid) will be rejected and logged for remediation, with no processing performed.
Sub-processors: Qilin Cloud (Guangzhou) Data Hosting Co., Ltd. (USCC 91440101MA5DF6R2M9) for infrastructure; Muduo Outsourced Payroll (Chengdu) Ltd. (USCC 91510100MA6A9J7F4Q) for payroll, each bound by this DPA and subject to audits.
Security: encryption in transit and at rest, role-based access controls, quarterly MNPI access reviews, and incident notification within 48 hours to the controller and, if required, to CAC.
Queries and complaints: compliance@silverharbor.cn or +86-755-6601-2000 for non-urgent questions; securities market complaints should be directed to the CSRC via 12386 (do not disclose PI beyond what is necessary).
